# QR-SaaS

> QR-SaaS is a web application for creating, customizing, and tracking QR codes with built-in analytics.

## Features

- Custom QR code generation with colors, dot styles, corner shapes, and logo upload
- 12+ social media templates (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, etc.)
- Real-time scan analytics and tracking dashboard
- Multi-format export: PNG, SVG, JPEG at any resolution
- Short URL generation for every QR code
- Mobile-first responsive design with dark mode

## Plans

- Free: 10 QR codes, unlimited scans, basic customization, PNG export
- Pro ($9/mo): Unlimited QR codes, full customization, all export formats, advanced analytics, logo upload
- Business ($29/mo): Team collaboration, API access, custom domains, bulk generation, white-label

## Tech Stack

- Next.js (App Router), Supabase (PostgreSQL), Tailwind CSS, Better Auth

## Links

- Website: https://qr-saas.app
- Full documentation: https://qr-saas.app/llms-full.txt
